# Exports

This folder contains generated artifacts.

## Included
- `Lighthouse_Current_Iteration_2026-01-15_FULL.zip` — the complete, downloadable archive of the current iteration (text + code + tests).

## Typical outputs (generated by `04_CODE/lighthouse_all.py`)
- `lsp.json` (from `build-lsp`)
- `keys/` (from `gen-keys`)
- `signed_packet.json` (from `sign-packet`)
